zh.lifeSummary: Margery de Holgrave是Henry de Hulgreve的女兒，於1197年出生在英國英格蘭爾希 萊。她於大約1219年與Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1275年在她的家鄉享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margery de Holgrave是Henry de Hulgreve的女儿，于1197年出生在英国英格兰爾希 萊。她于大约1219年与Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1275年在她的家乡享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Holtgrewe
meanings: North German: occupational name for a forest warden, Middle Low German holtgreve, a compound of holt ‘small wood’ + greve ‘warden’, related to High German Graf .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: Margery de Holgrave was born in 1197, in High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Henry de Hulgreve. She married Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh about 1219, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1275, in her hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Margery de Holgrave est née en 1197, à High Legh, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Henry de Hulgreve. Elle a épousé Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh environ 1219, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1275, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margery de Holgrave wurde 1197 in High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Henry de Hulgreve geboren. Sie hat um 1219 in England, United Kingdom Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1275 im Alter von 78 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Margery de Holgrave è nata il nel 1197 nel High Legh, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Henry de Hulgreve. Lei sposato Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh circa 1219, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1275, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Holgraveは1197年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヒグ レグでHenry de Hulgreveの娘として生まれた。約1219年にイギリスイギリスでRichard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1275年に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Holgrave(은)는 1197년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 히그h 레그h에서 Henry de Hulgreve의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1219년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 그녀의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margery de Holgrave nasceu em 1197, em High Legh, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Henry de Hulgreve. Ela casou-se com Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh aproximadamente 1219, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1275, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margery de Holgrave родилась в 1197 г. в местности хаи лег, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Henry de Hulgreve. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh около 1219 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1275 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.
